policyStatement: Dependency audit manifests record release-runner evidence only; this template does not claim public beta readiness.

release.ciRunUrl: <required: CI run URL or release-runner audit record>

nodeNpm.toolEvidence: <required: npm version or CI run evidence for npm audit>
nodeNpm.runEvidence: <required: CI step URL, run URL, or command output evidence for apps/client-tauri npm audit>
nodeNpm.advisorySummary: <required: advisory ids and severities, or state no high/critical advisories reported>

rustRoot.toolEvidence: <required: cargo-audit version or CI run evidence>
rustRoot.runEvidence: <required: CI step URL, run URL, or command output evidence for root Cargo.lock>
rustRoot.advisorySummary: <required: RustSec advisory ids and severities, or state no advisories reported>

rustTauri.toolEvidence: <required: cargo-audit version or CI run evidence>
rustTauri.runEvidence: <required: CI step URL, run URL, or command output evidence for apps/client-tauri/src-tauri/Cargo.lock>
rustTauri.advisorySummary: <required: RustSec advisory ids and severities, or state no advisories reported>

tauriRustLockedChecks.toolEvidence: <required: cargo version or CI run evidence>
tauriRustLockedChecks.runEvidence: <required: CI step URL, run URL, or command output evidence for locked cargo check and cargo test against apps/client-tauri/src-tauri/Cargo.toml>
tauriRustLockedChecks.checkTestSummary: <required: state locked cargo check and cargo test passed, or summarize the blocked/failing check/test evidence>

unresolvedHighCriticalProductionAdvisory.rationale: <required: state no unresolved production high/critical advisories, or beta is blocked pending remediation>
